title: Effect of pesticides on nitrification
abstract:
INCREASED       amounts  of pesticides  are applied to 
soil in addition to large amounts of these chemicals   
reaching soil from above ground pest control mea­       
sures. Do these chemicals have side effects on sensi­    
tive microorganisms like nitrifiers?    In the present       review an attempt has been made to gather the in­

formation available on this aspect as whether 
the peticides effect...........
